summary: Russian forces in the Krasny Liman direction intercepted a Ukrainian "Shark-M" fixed-wing UAV using the "Yolka" anti-aircraft drone, triggering its parachute system and allowing capture with minimal damage. In the same area, the 238th Guards Artillery Brigade used "Yolka" to kinetically intercept a Ukrainian "Hornet" UAV, causing its warhead to detonate. On April 15, 2026, Rubicon Center operators conducted operations across Donbas, the Belgorod and Krasny Liman directions, destroying 107 targets including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and coordinating with Russian Aerospace Forces to neutralize launch positions. Russia also tested group deployment technology for S350M Supercam strike drones, enabling automatic target information exchange and coordinated strikes.
